full_text:
Yin Mo (Siqian) 尹默 (思潛)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yin Mo (尹默), styledSiqian (思潛), was born in Fu prefecture in Zitong commandry. Learnt from Sima Hui, had great knowledge of the classics, appointed tutor of Liu Shan. Yin Mo was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Yin Mo lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
